name: intercom
description: Reads Intercom contacts, companies, conversations, admins, and tags; tracks the full Intercom REST API 2.14 surface for safe CLI parity follow-up work.

risk.read: external Intercom API reads can include customer, company, conversation, admin, and tag data from the configured workspace
risk.write: no write actions are currently executable; planned mutations remain blocked by default until typed reverse-ETL schemas and approval gates are implemented
risk.approval: metadata-only planned writes do not execute; future reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute, and destructive typed confirmation where applicable
